homepage.heroSubline: Powering homes and businesses across Indy. Reliable service, guaranteed quality, and upfront pricing.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Electrical Expertise in Indianapolis
aboutText: Indy Electric started with a simple mission: provide dependable electrical services to our Indianapolis neighbors. Founded by lifelong Hoosier, Mark Olsen, we’ve grown from a small operation to a trusted name across Marion County.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our electricians are highly trained, licensed, and committed to exceeding expectations. We prioritize safety, efficiency, and clear communication on every job.

Indy Electric is proud to be part of the Indianapolis community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our clients. We're not just electricians; we're your neighbors.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Electrical emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. We're available around the clock to handle urgent issues.

valueProps.title: Upfront, Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprise charges. We provide clear, detailed estimates before any work begins.

valueProps.title: Licensed & Insured
valueProps.description: Your safety and peace of mind are our top priorities. We're fully licensed and insured for all electrical work.

valueProps.title: Local Indianapolis Experts
valueProps.description: We understand the unique electrical needs of Indianapolis homes and businesses, from historic Irvington houses to modern Carmel developments.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Get Your Free Electrical Estimate Today!
homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Indy Electric for reliable service and expert solutions.

services.name: Electrical Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable electrical repair for Indianapolis homes and businesses.
services.description:
From flickering lights to faulty outlets, electrical problems can disrupt your life and pose safety hazards. Indy Electric offers comprehensive electrical repair services to address any issue, big or small.

Our experienced electricians are equipped to diagnose and repair a wide range of electrical problems, including:
* Outlet and switch repairs
* Lighting repair and replacement
* Circuit breaker issues
* Wiring problems
* Electrical panel repairs
* Appliance circuit installation and repair

We understand the importance of prompt and reliable service. That's why we offer 24/7 emergency repair services to handle urgent electrical issues. Our electricians arrive on time, equipped with the necessary tools and expertise to get the job done right. We also respect your property and ensure a clean and tidy work area. We take pride in resolving your electrical problems quickly and efficiently, restoring safety and convenience to your home or business. Whether you're dealing with a minor inconvenience or a major electrical malfunction, Indy Electric is here to help.
process: Step 1: Contact us for a free consultation and schedule a convenient appointment.
Step 2: Our electrician will arrive on time, assess the problem, and provide a detailed explanation of the repair options.
Step 3: We'll provide a transparent, upfront price quote before any work begins.
Step 4: Our skilled electrician will perform the repair efficiently and safely, ensuring your satisfaction.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and strive to arrive at your location as quickly as possible, typically within an hour, depending on your location in the Indianapolis metro area.

faq.question: Are your electricians licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed and insured to provide electrical services in Indianapolis, Indiana. We prioritize safety and adhere to all local and national electrical codes.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your electrical repairs?
faq.answer: Yes, we stand behind our workmanship and offer a warranty on all electrical repairs. The specific warranty period may vary depending on the type of repair, so please inquire for details.

services.name: Electrical Installation Services
services.shortDescription: Expert electrical installation for new construction, remodels, and upgrades.
services.description:
Whether you're building a new home, remodeling your kitchen, or upgrading your electrical panel, Indy Electric provides expert electrical installation services to meet your needs. We handle all types of electrical installations, from basic wiring to complex systems.

Our installation services include:
* New construction wiring
* Remodeling electrical work
* Electrical panel upgrades
* Lighting installation (indoor and outdoor)
* Outlet and switch installation
* Appliance circuit installation
* Generator installation
* Smart home automation

We work closely with homeowners, contractors, and builders to ensure that all electrical installations are performed safely, efficiently, and according to code. We use high-quality materials and follow industry best practices to ensure long-lasting performance. Our electricians are experienced in working with a variety of electrical systems and can provide customized solutions to meet your specific requirements. We understand that electrical installations can be disruptive, so we strive to minimize inconvenience and complete the work as quickly as possible. With Indy Electric, you can be confident that your electrical installation will be done right the first time.
process: Step 1: Schedule a consultation to discuss your electrical installation needs.
Step 2: We'll develop a detailed plan and provide a transparent price quote.
Step 3: Our experienced electricians will perform the installation efficiently and safely.
Step 4: We'll thoroughly test the installation and ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: How long does an electrical panel upgrade typically take?
faq.answer: An electrical panel upgrade usually takes about 4-8 hours, depending on the complexity of the installation and any necessary modifications to your electrical system. We'll provide a more accurate estimate during the consultation.

faq.question: Do you handle permits for electrical installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we handle all necessary permits for electrical installations in Indianapolis and surrounding areas. We'll ensure that your installation meets all local and national electrical codes.

faq.question: Can you install smart home automation systems?
faq.answer: Yes, we are experienced in installing a variety of smart home automation systems, including smart lighting, thermostats, and security systems. We can help you design and install a system that meets your needs and budget.

services.name: Lighting Services
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home with professional lighting solutions from Indy Electric.
services.description:
From recessed lighting to landscape lighting, Indy Electric offers a wide range of lighting services to enhance the beauty, functionality, and energy efficiency of your home or business. We can help you design and install a lighting system that meets your specific needs and aesthetic preferences.

Our lighting services include:
* Recessed lighting installation
* Chandelier installation
* Track lighting installation
* Under-cabinet lighting installation
* Landscape lighting installation
* Security lighting installation
* Energy-efficient lighting upgrades (LED lighting)

We work with a variety of lighting styles and technologies to create the perfect ambiance for your space. Whether you're looking to brighten up a dark room, highlight architectural features, or create a welcoming outdoor environment, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We use high-quality lighting fixtures and follow industry best practices to ensure long-lasting performance and energy savings. Our electricians are skilled in all aspects of lighting installation, from wiring and fixture mounting to control system programming. Let Indy Electric illuminate your home or business with our professional lighting services.
process: Step 1: Contact us for a free lighting consultation.
Step 2: We'll assess your needs and recommend the best lighting solutions for your space.
Step 3: We'll provide a detailed price quote and schedule the installation.
Step 4: Our skilled electricians will install your new lighting system efficiently and safely.

faq.question: What are the benefits of switching to LED lighting?
faq.answer: LED lighting offers numerous benefits, including energy savings, longer lifespan, reduced maintenance costs, and improved light quality. LEDs also contain no harmful chemicals and are more environmentally friendly than traditional lighting options.

faq.question: Can you install outdoor lighting to enhance my home's curb appeal?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in outdoor lighting installation, including landscape lighting, security lighting, and pathway lighting. We can help you create a beautiful and welcoming outdoor environment that enhances your home's curb appeal and security.

faq.question: Do you offer lighting control systems?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install lighting control systems that allow you to easily adjust the brightness and color temperature of your lights. These systems can also be integrated with smart home automation systems for added convenience.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for safety and increased capacity.
services.description:
Is your electrical panel outdated, overloaded, or showing signs of wear and tear? An electrical panel upgrade from Indy Electric can ensure the safety and reliability of your electrical system. Older homes in neighborhoods like Broad Ripple and Meridian-Kessler often have inadequate electrical panels that can't handle the demands of modern appliances and electronics. Upgrading your panel can prevent overloaded circuits, flickering lights, and potential fire hazards.

Our electrical panel upgrade services include:
* Panel replacement
* Breaker replacement
* Wiring upgrades
* Grounding improvements
* Capacity upgrades

We assess your electrical needs and recommend the appropriate panel size and configuration to meet your current and future demands. Our electricians are experienced in working with all types of electrical panels and follow industry best practices to ensure a safe and reliable installation. We also handle all necessary permits and inspections to ensure code compliance. Don't wait until you experience an electrical problem. Upgrade your electrical panel today for peace of mind and increased safety.
process: Step 1: Schedule an electrical panel inspection.
Step 2: We'll assess your electrical needs and recommend the appropriate panel upgrade.
Step 3: We'll provide a detailed price quote and schedule the installation.
Step 4: Our qualified electricians will perform the panel upgrade safely and efficiently.

faq.question: How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need an electrical panel upgrade include frequent tripped breakers, flickering lights, outdated panel, and the addition of new appliances or electronics.

faq.question: How much does an electrical panel upgrade cost?
faq.answer: The cost of an electrical panel upgrade varies depending on the size and complexity of the installation. We'll provide a detailed price quote after assessing your electrical needs.

faq.question: How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?
faq.answer: An electrical panel upgrade typically takes about 4-8 hours, depending on the complexity of the installation.

services.name: Generator Installation
services.shortDescription: Protect your home with a reliable generator installation.
services.description:
Indianapolis weather can be unpredictable, with severe thunderstorms and power outages common during the summer months. A generator from Indy Electric can provide backup power to keep your lights on, your appliances running, and your family safe during a power outage.

Our generator installation services include:
* Standby generator installation
* Portable generator hookups
* Automatic transfer switch installation
* Generator maintenance and repair

We assess your power needs and recommend the appropriate generator size and type to meet your requirements. Our electricians are experienced in installing all types of generators and follow industry best practices to ensure a safe and reliable installation. We also handle all necessary permits and inspections to ensure code compliance. Don't be left in the dark during the next power outage. Contact Indy Electric for a generator installation today.
process: Step 1: Schedule a generator consultation.
Step 2: We'll assess your power needs and recommend the appropriate generator.
Step 3: We'll provide a detailed price quote and schedule the installation.
Step 4: Our qualified electricians will install your generator safely and efficiently.

faq.question: What size generator do I need?
faq.answer: The size of generator you need depends on your power requirements. We'll assess your needs and recommend the appropriate size during the consultation.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a generator installation?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is typically required for generator installations. We'll handle all necessary permits and inspections.

faq.question: How often should I maintain my generator?
faq.answer: We recommend annual generator maintenance to ensure reliable operation. We offer generator maintenance and repair services.

services.name: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive electrical solutions for Indianapolis businesses.
services.description:
Indy Electric provides a full spectrum of commercial electrical services to businesses throughout Indianapolis. We understand the unique electrical needs of commercial properties, from office buildings to retail spaces to industrial facilities. Our experienced electricians are equipped to handle any electrical project, big or small.

Our commercial electrical services include:
* Electrical system design and installation
* Lighting upgrades and maintenance
* Electrical panel upgrades
* Emergency repairs
* Data cabling
* Generator installation and maintenance
* Code compliance inspections

We work closely with business owners, property managers, and contractors to ensure that all electrical work is performed safely, efficiently, and to code. We understand the importance of minimizing downtime and disruption to your business operations. That's why we offer flexible scheduling and 24/7 emergency service. Trust Indy Electric to keep your business powered up and running smoothly.
process: Step 1: Schedule a commercial electrical consultation.
Step 2: We'll assess your needs and develop a customized solution.
Step 3: We'll provide a detailed price quote and schedule the work.
Step 4: Our qualified electricians will perform the work efficiently and safely.

faq.question: Do you offer electrical maintenance contracts?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer customized electrical maintenance contracts to help you keep your electrical system in top condition and prevent costly repairs.

faq.question: Can you handle large-scale electrical projects?
faq.answer: Yes, we have the expertise and resources to handle large-scale electrical projects for commercial properties of all sizes.

faq.question: Do you offer energy-efficient lighting solutions for businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, we can help you upgrade your lighting system to energy-efficient LEDs and save money on your energy bills.

serviceAreas.content:
Indy Electric is proud to offer comprehensive electrical services to the residents and businesses of Carmel, Indiana. Known for its upscale 1980s-2000s developments and family-friendly atmosphere, Carmel presents unique electrical needs, from ensuring the safety and efficiency of existing wiring in established homes to installing modern electrical systems in new constructions. We understand the importance of reliable power in Carmel, especially during the cold Indiana winters when snow and ice are common. 

Our team of licensed and experienced electricians is equipped to handle any electrical project in Carmel, big or small. We specialize in everything from routine maintenance and repairs to complex installations and upgrades. Whether you need to troubleshoot a faulty circuit, install new lighting fixtures, or upgrade your electrical panel to accommodate modern appliances, Indy Electric is here to provide prompt, professional, and affordable service. We are committed to keeping your home or business powered safely and efficiently throughout the year.
serviceAreas.localContext: Carmel's upscale homes and family-oriented environment demand reliable electrical solutions, especially during the winter months when heating systems are heavily relied upon.

serviceAreas.content:

The cold Indiana winters, marked by snow and ice, necessitate reliable and efficient heating and electrical systems.

Our experienced electricians are well-versed in the latest electrical technologies and building codes. reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Indy Electric was fantastic! Our old panel was causing problems, and they upgraded it quickly and efficiently. The electrician was very professional and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John K.
reviews.text: We had Indy Electric install recessed lighting in our kitchen, and it looks amazing! There was a small delay on the first visit, but they communicated well and the final result was worth it. Very happy with the service.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Our power went out in the middle of the night, and Indy Electric was there within an hour. They quickly diagnosed the problem and fixed it. Their emergency service saved the day!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Indy Electric installed a whole-house generator for us, and it's been a lifesaver. We haven't had to worry about power outages since. The installation was smooth and professional.

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: I had a faulty outlet that needed repair. Indy Electric was prompt, courteous, and fixed the issue quickly. The price was fair, and I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Indy Electric has been our go-to electrician for our business for years. They are reliable, professional, and always do a great job. Recently they upgraded our lighting to LEDs, saving us money on our energy bill.
